description: Visualization of active site residue conservation comparing DPYS, CRMP1, and CRMP2
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a visualization of the active site residue conservation
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 7))

# Data
residues = ['H67\n(Zn²⁺ α)', 'H69\n(Zn²⁺ α)', 'K159\n(carbamate)', 'Y164\n(substrate)', 
            'H192\n(Zn²⁺ β)', 'H248\n(Zn²⁺)', 'D326\n(Zn²⁺ β)', 'N347\n(substrate)']
dpys_aa = ['H', 'H', 'K', 'Y', 'H', 'H', 'D', 'N']
crmp1_aa = ['N', 'Y', 'Q', 'Y', 'H', 'K', 'G', 'E']
crmp2_aa = ['H', 'R', 'L', 'F', 'H', 'K', 'A', 'E']

crmp1_conserved = [1 if a == b else 0 for a, b in zip(dpys_aa, crmp1_aa)]
crmp2_conserved = [1 if a == b else 0 for a, b in zip(dpys_aa, crmp2_aa)]

x = np.arange(len(residues))
width = 0.35

# Color bars
colors_crmp1 = ['#2ecc71' if c else '#e74c3c' for c in crmp1_conserved]
colors_crmp2 = ['#2ecc71' if c else '#e74c3c' for c in crmp2_conserved]

bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, [1]*8, width, color=colors_crmp1, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, [1]*8, width, color=colors_crmp2, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.8)

# Add amino acid labels on bars
for i, (bar, aa) in enumerate(zip(bars1, crmp1_aa)):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, 0.5, aa, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='white')
    
for i, (bar, aa) in enumerate(zip(bars2, crmp2_aa)):
    ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, 0.5, aa, ha='center', va='center', 
            fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='white')

# Add DPYS reference on top
for i, aa in enumerate(dpys_aa):
    ax.text(x[i], 1.15, f'DPYS: {aa}', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=10, 
            fontweight='bold', color='#2c3e50')

ax.set_ylabel('')
ax.set_title('Active Site Residue Conservation: DPYS (true enzyme) vs CRMP1/CRMP2\n'
             'Green = conserved, Red = substituted (catalytically incompatible)', 
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(residues, fontsize=9)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.4)
ax.set_yticks([])

# Legend
conserved_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2ecc71', label='Conserved')
lost_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', label='Substituted (non-functional)')
ax.legend(handles=[conserved_patch, lost_patch], loc='upper right', fontsize=10)

# Add labels for CRMP1 and CRMP2
ax.text(-0.7, 0.5, 'CRMP1', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', 
        color='#8e44ad', rotation=0)
ax.text(7.7, 0.5, 'CRMP2', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', 
        color='#2980b9', rotation=0)

# Add summary text
summary_text = (f"CRMP1: 2/8 conserved (25%)\n"
                f"CRMP2: 2/8 conserved (25%)\n"
                f"Both lack zinc-binding capacity\n"
                f"→ No hydrolase activity expected")
ax.text(0.02, 0.98, summary_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=10,
        verticalalignment='top', bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

# Labels
ax.text(x[0] - width/2 - 0.15, -0.22, 'CRMP1', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='#8e44ad', fontweight='bold')
ax.text(x[0] + width/2 + 0.15, -0.22, 'CRMP2', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='#2980b9', fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('active_site_comparison.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: active_site_comparison.png")
